overall_summary: The mapping correctly identifies CIS 11.4 as a FULL match for alternate storage and CIS 11.3 as a PARTIAL match for protection via separation. Rationales are specific and tied to control intent. No false negatives or rule violations detected; prerequisites (11.1, 11.2, 11.5) were correctly excluded.

per_mapping_verdicts.judge_note: Rationale correctly links BM-04's 'alternate location' to 11.3's 'data separation' option. PARTIAL mapping type is appropriate as 11.3 also allows encryption.
Direct semantic match between 'isolated instance/off-site' (11.4) and 'alternate location' (BM-04). FULL mapping type is justified.
